name: research-assistant
description: 社科研究助手 v3.0 — 语境锚点理论发现 + 顶刊范文后置校准。迭代环架构，灵活入口，AI 智能判断起点。

plugins.name: research-assistant
plugins.description: 6-phase iterative loop: phenomenon anchoring + theory discovery → literature search → empirical design → data viz → peer review + template calibration → revision + delivery. Skips empirical phases for pure theory papers.
